title: GBP Management Set Up

# GBP Management Set Up

transcript.text: So let me show you how we lead snap setup.
This is going to be pretty consistent with whatever
GBP management software you're using,
the one that we use is lead snaps.
That's why I'm going to show you lead snap.
So I already had this added to lead snap.
It's very easy to add, so I won't show you how to do that.
It's pretty straightforward though, but once we add it,
we can come into here and make all of these changes.
Now my preference is to always make these changes
through the GBP management software
and not through the GBP interface itself.
In my experience, it typically sticks a lot better
if the changes are made through the GBP management software
and it's less likely to trigger re-verifications
or cause issues.
So I almost always make every change
that I can through here.
So I'll go through the business details
and make sure this is all accurate.
We can see that we have to update the opening date
and that's just because the lead snap,
we have this little dropdown.
So we're just going to select that to make sure it matches,
to make sure it matches what's on the GBP itself.
We can come through here and this is fine.
So service categories, this is the only place
so we can add additional categories.
We have the one category driving school.
We want to add the additional categories.
I'm not going to do that here
because we don't have the approval yet,
the agreement yet from the client
that those are the categories and services
that we want to offer to,
but we can see that we just select it
and we do it that way.
So we'll go through and do that.
We'll make sure the hours are correct.
We can update the special hours here also.
Once we've done that, especially the categories and services
after you get permission approval agreement from the client
that those categories and services make sense,
then we can come on to the next step, which is in photos.
So, and you can see we have 26 photos.
We want to add schedule photos.
And obviously what we would do here
is get a bunch of photos from the client.
As many as they can give you 50, 100 photos, that's fine.
If they can't give you any photos
then we'll typically use AI to generate a whole bunch
and we'll get their approval agreement
to use those photos before we publish them.
But for now, I don't have any of that.
This is relatively new client.
So I'm just going to grab this photo of this handsome dude
and we'll hit next, just because I want to show this to you.
So once we have the photo,
and if I had multiple ones, we'd see all of them here.
So we can select the categories.
So we can select the categories, what it is.
We can rename the photo, you can see the current name,
we can rename it, we can add keywords,
and we can add a geotag, and then we can choose a date.
And I can also hit drip photos here
and that will automatically schedule everything
to go out as we want it to.
So really powerful, we can set this up
in just a few minutes with a few dozen photos.
And yeah, so I'm obviously not going to upload
that handsome dude, but we'll get some photos
from the client and take care of that.
Frequent photos like that are important.
Okay, so we'll come back down over to services.
And this is an easier interface to actually add services to.
If we had other categories, we'd see it
and then we'd see add a service.
So it's a little bit easier of a format
than the other one, but we can't add categories here.
We have to add categories in business details.
Notifications, this is just where we want
to be notified of anything that comes up, great.
Okay, and then in the post.
So we'll come into the post here.
And what we have is, obviously we're going to,
for the most part, write with AI.
We often don't include photos, but usually,
so I'll put the prompt in that we often use.
We jumped over to Gemini, no problem.
We'll jump back over here.
So this obviously will change the business name.
And I'll put this in the right way, driving school,
on serving the highlight.
Perfect, okay.
And then we can hit schedule and we can turn recurring on
and then we can set what date we want them to occur
and what time and we can just recur forever.
So then now we have a weekly post, emojis or hashtags,
tone, we can set, I often like to do persuasive
and emojis and hashtags, I usually like to include those
because those are pretty common.
So that's how we set up the post.
It's pretty easy, pretty straightforward.
Again, I'll put this prompt in the lesson,
pretty short prompt.
It's limited on lead snap here for how long it can be.
So pretty short.
Okay, and then when we come into reviews,
we see all the reviews here.

summary: This lesson explains how to set up GBP management using Lead Snap software. It covers adding business details, service categories, scheduling photos and posts, and managing reviews.
key_points: Add business details through GBP management software
Update opening date and service categories as needed
Schedule photos and posts with AI assistance
Set up recurring posts with prompts
